title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Develop domain models for URLs including short and long forms.
steps.done_condition: Domain models for URLs are implemented and unit tested

steps.description: Define ports for URL shortening and retrieval functionality.
steps.done_condition: Ports for URL operations are defined and documented

steps.description: Implement use case for shortening URLs.
steps.done_condition: Use case for shortening URLs is implemented and tested

steps.description: Implement use case for retrieving original URLs from short links.
steps.done_condition: Use case for retrieving URLs is implemented and tested

steps.description: Develop the primary adapter for handling HTTP requests for the API.
steps.done_condition: HTTP adapter for the URL shortener is implemented and can handle requests

steps.description: Implement API endpoints for shortening and retrieval of URLs.
steps.done_condition: API endpoints for URL shortening and retrieval are up and running with basic tests

steps.description: Create integration tests for the URL shortener API.
steps.done_condition: Integration tests validate the complete API functionality

successCriteria: API responds correctly to HTTP requests for shortening and retrieving URLs
All unit tests for domain, ports, and use cases pass
